title: Sushi-Mon
description: This Modpack is inhabited by creatures called Cobblemon, Come find out more!
body:
Step into the captivating world of Sushi-Mon, where the Cobblemon creatures await! These creatures can be your trusted pets or formidable allies in battle.

With this mod pack, you have the power to bring your dream city or town to life, inspired by the unforgettable charm of Pokemon games. Imagine creating vibrant marketplaces, inviting homes, and intricate pathways, all adorned with Cobblemon-themed decor, giving your town an unmistakable personality.

But there's more! Not only can you craft your own city, but you can also establish your very own Cobblemon gyms. Shape them to represent your favorite Cobblemon type or a dojo filled with thrilling challenges. You can even invite your friends to take on your gym by setting up NPCs!

At the heart of Sushi-Mon lies the Cobblemon experience with friends. Capture, train, and engage in battles with your cherished Cobblemon in a hand-crafted world where imagination and culture can blend together.
